items.name: Dazzling Gemstone Dress (G)
items.description:
Step into the spotlight with the Dazzling Gemstone Dress! This stylish, playful dress is shaped like actual gemstones, perfect for glamorous parties. Its sparkling, multi-faceted design mimics real gem brilliance. This eye-catching dress is available only at the Claire’s Store located in The Shoppes. 
- Rarity: GOLD
- First Edition

Remember, spending Robux is like spending real money, so make sure you have an adult’s permission before you buy
